job_description:
Technical Project Manager (Full-Stack Platform)

We are seeking a hybrid Technical Project Manager to own the end-to-end delivery of our cross-platform ecosystem. This role bridges the client’s vision with our engineering team, overseeing a stack that includes a React Native mobile suite, a React web portal, and a Python/Django backend. You will define the product roadmap, manage stakeholder expectations, and ensure technical constraints are addressed to build the right solutions effectively.

Core Responsibilities

  • Product Leadership: Partner with the client to define product vision, gather requirements, and translate business needs into actionable user stories and functional specifications.
  • Scope Management: Own the product backlog, prioritizing features based on ROI, technical complexity, and client deadlines.
  • Technical Orchestration: Coordinate development across the full stack (Python/Django, React, and React Native), ensuring seamless integration between backend APIs and frontend interfaces.
  • Agile Delivery: Lead Scrum ceremonies (sprint planning, stand-ups, retrospectives) and remove blockers to maintain engineering team velocity.
  • Quality Assurance: Define Acceptance Criteria and conduct User Acceptance Testing (UAT) to align final delivery with client intent.
  • Stakeholder Communication: Provide transparent reporting on project health, risks, and timelines to executives and client partners.

Technical & Professional Requirements

  • Experience: 5+ years in technical project or product management, delivering full-stack web and mobile applications.
  • Tech Stack Fluency:
  • Backend: RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL schema design, Django architecture.
  • Frontend: Component-driven React development, React Native lifecycle.
  • Strategic Tools: Proficiency in Jira, Confluence, Linear, or similar project management suites.
  • Analytical Skills: Experience using data (Google Analytics, Mixpanel, SQL) to inform product decisions.
  • Client-Facing Prowess: Exceptional communication skills to diplomatically manage stakeholder expectations.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

  • On-Time Delivery: Consistent sprint velocity and milestone adherence.
  • Scope Accuracy: Minimize feature creep through rigorous discovery and documentation.
  • Client Satisfaction: High NPS or feedback ratings via proactive communication.
  • Code-to-Requirement Alignment: Minimal rework by ensuring engineering output matches functional specs.

Contact: Share your resume at recruiter@aimagroup.co.uk.
summary: Lead full-stack platform projects, bridging client vision with engineering. Manage React Native, React, and Django stacks with Agile methodologies.

job_description:
Senior Mobile Engineer (React Native)

We are seeking a high-caliber Senior Mobile Engineer to lead the development of our cross-platform mobile applications. As a core member of our engineering team, you will be responsible for architecting scalable solutions, mentoring junior developers, and ensuring a seamless, high-performance experience for our users across both iOS and Android.

Core Responsibilities

  • Architecture & Development: Lead the design and implementation of complex, reusable components and features using React Native.
  • Performance Optimization: Identify and fix performance bottlenecks, memory leaks, and "jank" to ensure a buttery-smooth 60 FPS UI.
  • Code Quality: Drive engineering excellence through rigorous code reviews, unit/integration testing (Jest, Detox), and CI/CD automation.
  • Collaboration: Work closely with Product Managers and UI/UX Designers to translate wireframes into pixel-perfect, functional realities.

Technical Requirements

  • Framework Experience: At least 5+ years of professional mobile development experience, with a minimum of 3+ years dedicated to React Native.
  • Language Mastery: Expert-level command of TypeScript and JavaScript (ES6+).
  • State Management: Deep architectural expertise in managing complex application states using Redux, MobX, or the React Context API.
  • Navigation: Extensive hands-on experience implementing fluid user flows with React Navigation or React Native Navigation.
  • DevOps & Tooling: Proven ability to manage the full release lifecycle using Fastlane, Bitrise/CircleCI, and direct deployment to the App Store and Google Play Store.
  • Testing & Quality: A commitment to stability through rigorous testing with Jest, React Native Testing Library, or automated E2E frameworks like Detox.

Desired Attributes

  • Problem Solver: You don’t just find bugs; you find the root cause and implement long-term structural fixes.
  • Product-Minded: You care about the "why" behind a feature, not just the "how."
  • Continuous Learner: You stay up-to-date with the evolving React Native ecosystem (e.g., the New Architecture, TurboModules, Fabric).

Bonus Points

  • Experience with GraphQL and Apollo Client.
  • Knowledge of Skia or Reanimated for advanced animations.
  • Background in Server-Side Rendering (SSR) or web development with React.
  • Previous experience in a high-growth startup environment.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at recruiter@aimagroup.co.uk.

Oracle Database Administrator (Cloud) – Job Description

Job Summary

The Oracle Database Administrator (Cloud) is responsible for managing, securing, and optimizing Oracle databases hosted in cloud and hybrid environments, with a strong focus on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). The role ensures high availability, performance, scalability, security, and cost efficiency of cloud-based database platforms supporting mission-critical applications.

Key Responsibilities

Cloud Database Administration (OCI-Focused) - Provision, configure, and manage Oracle Databases on OCI: - Oracle Autonomous Database (ATP/ADW) - Database Cloud Service (DBCS) - Exadata Cloud Service / Exadata Cloud@Customer - Manage Single Instance, RAC, CDB/PDB architectures in cloud environments. - Perform database lifecycle management: provisioning, scaling, cloning, patching, and decommissioning.

Hybrid & Migration Responsibilities - Support hybrid environments (on-prem + OCI). - Plan and execute database migrations to the cloud using: - RMAN - Data Pump - OCI Database Migration Service - Goldengate (if applicable) - Validate performance and functionality post-migration. - Support cross-region and cross-tenancy architectures.

High Availability, DR & Resilience - Design and manage: - OCI Data Guard - Automated backups and recovery - Cross-region disaster recovery - Perform recovery testing and DR drills. - Ensure compliance with RTO/RPO objectives. - Manage rolling upgrades and patching with minimal downtime.

Performance & Cost Optimization - Monitor and tune databases using: - OCI Console - AWR / ADDM / ASH - OCI Monitoring & Alarms - Optimize: - Storage (block/object) - Compute shapes - Licensing and resource utilization - Implement cost-aware architectures and usage tracking (FinOps).

Security, Compliance & Governance - Implement cloud security best practices: - IAM policies - Network security (VCNs, NSGs, Security Lists) - Encryption (TDE, OCI Vault) - Manage database access controls, auditing, and separation of duties. - Support compliance requirements (ISO, SOX, GDPR, etc.). - Perform vulnerability remediation and security hardening.

Automation & DevOps Enablement - Automate database operations using: - Shell scripting - SQL / PL/SQL - OCI CLI & SDK - Terraform / Ansible - Integrate database changes into CI/CD pipelines. - Support Infrastructure as Code (IaC) for database provisioning. - Enable self-service patterns for development teams.

Monitoring, Incident & Operations Management - Set up proactive monitoring, alerts, and dashboards. - Troubleshoot cloud-specific issues (latency, connectivity, scaling). - Participate in 24x7 on-call rotations for production support. - Perform root cause analysis (RCA) and implement preventive controls.

Documentation & Cross-Team Collaboration - Maintain cloud architecture diagrams and operational runbooks. - Work closely with: - Cloud architects - DevOps engineers - Application teams - Security and compliance teams - Provide technical guidance and mentoring to junior DBAs.

Education & Certifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in computer science / IT or related field
  • Preferred certifications:
  • Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Architect or DBA
  • Oracle Certified Professional (OCP)
  • Exadata / Performance / Security certifications

Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Technical Business Analyst with strong experience in modern backend architectures, including Node.js, NestJS, and microservices. The role involves bridging business requirements with scalable technical solutions, working closely with product owners, architects, and development teams in an Agile environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with stakeholders to gather, analyze, and validate business and technical requirements
  • Translate business needs into detailed functional and technical specifications
  • Create user stories, acceptance criteria, process flows, and data flow diagrams
  • Work closely with developers to design solutions aligned with microservices architecture
  • Understand and document API contracts, integrations, and service interactions
  • Participate in Agile ceremonies (sprint planning, backlog grooming, retrospectives)
  • Support QA in test scenario creation, UAT coordination, and defect analysis
  • Ensure requirements traceability and maintain documentation in tools like JIRA/Confluence
  • Identify opportunities for process optimization and system improvements
  • Act as a liaison between business, technology, and external stakeholders

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field
  • 5+ years of experience as a Business Analyst in software development projects
  • Strong understanding of SDLC and Agile/Scrum methodologies
  • Hands-on experience with:
  • Node.js and/or NestJS-based systems
  • Microservices architecture and distributed systems
  • Solid understanding of:
  • RESTful APIs, API documentation (Swagger/OpenAPI)
  • Experience with requirement management tools (JIRA, Confluence, etc.)
  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and documentation skills
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities

Preferred Skills

  • Basic coding or debugging knowledge in Node.js / JavaScript / TypeScript
  • Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
  • Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, or containerized deployments
  • Knowledge of message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc.)
  • Exposure to CI/CD pipelines

Key Competencies

  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, Agile environment
  • Strong attention to detail and ownership mindset
  • Effective collaboration with cross-functional teams
  • Proactive approach to problem-solving and decision-making
summary: Senior Technical Business Analyst required to bridge business needs with technical solutions using Node.js and microservices. Must have 5+ years experience and strong Agile collaboration skills.

job_description:

Brief Description

We are seeking a highly skilled Senior QA Engineer with expertise in both manual and automation testing. The ideal candidate must have hands-on experience with Playwright (JavaScript/Python), Selenium (Java), and JMeter, along with a proven ability to design and maintain test automation frameworks. The role involves close collaboration with development and product teams to ensure high-quality software delivery across projects.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain automation test frameworks using Playwright, Selenium WebDriver, and JMeter.
  • Conduct manual testing (functional, regression, integration, smoke, UAT) and create detailed test plans, cases, and reports.
  • Identify, document, and track defects using tools like JIRA.
  • Collaborate with developers, business analysts, and project managers during all SDLC phases.
  • Participate in Agile ceremonies (daily standups, sprint planning, retrospectives).
  • Perform root cause analysis and provide feedback to development teams.
  • Review requirements and user stories for testability and quality feedback.
  • Execute API testing and support performance/load testing.
  • Mentor junior QA members and improve QA processes.
  • Communicate testing status, risks, and blockers to stakeholders.

Preferred Skills

Automation Testing: - Hands-on experience with Playwright (JavaScript/Python), Selenium WebDriver (Java), and JMeter. - Proficiency in TestNG/JUnit, Maven/Gradle, and Page Object Model (POM). - Experience with data-driven and keyword-driven frameworks. - CI/CD integration (Jenkins, GitHub Actions) and version control (Git, GitHub, Bitbucket).

Manual Testing: - Strong understanding of STLC and SDLC. - Expertise in writing test cases, plans, and strategies. - Experience in functional, regression, smoke, integration, and UAT testing. - Knowledge of defect lifecycle and bug reporting tools (JIRA, Bugzilla). - Cross-browser/platform testing.

Tools & Technologies: - Defect tracking tools (JIRA, Bugzilla). - API testing tools (Postman, REST Assured). - Basic SQL knowledge for test data validation. - Agile/Scrum methodology experience.

Experience Requirements

  • Total Experience: Minimum 5 years in Software Quality Assurance.
  • Automation Experience: Minimum 4 years in test automation using Playwright (Python/JavaScript) and Selenium (Java).
  • Playwright Experience: Hands-on experience is mandatory with Python/JavaScript.

Soft Skills & Attributes

  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Strong verbal and written communication.
  • Ability to work independently and in teams.
  • Proactive attitude toward quality issues.
  • Attention to detail and commitment to quality.
  • Task management and deadline prioritization.
summary: Senior QA Engineer with 5+ years in automation (Playwright, Selenium) and manual testing, ensuring software quality through frameworks and cross-team collaboration.
